gate_definitions.name: dataset
gate_definitions.pass: Enumerated first-value inputs use owner-authorized access with no mandatory paid, licensed, privileged, or unauthorized source.
gate_definitions.fail: A required field is available only through a mandatory paid/licensed third-party source or unauthorized/privileged access.
gate_definitions.unknown: Exact fields or rights remain unknown.

gate_definitions.name: integration-scraping
gate_definitions.pass: A stepwise first-value workflow uses files or manual input without API, credentials, scraping, or automated recovery.
gate_definitions.fail: A required step cannot work without integration, credentials, scraping, or automated recovery.
gate_definitions.unknown: A file route exists but completeness or joins remain unknown; evaluate those under G5.

gate_definitions.name: liability
gate_definitions.pass: A declared jurisdiction and role inventory establish no regulated or high-liability judgment.
gate_definitions.fail: The core output necessarily decides safety, eligibility, compliance, finance, or another high-liability matter.
gate_definitions.unknown: The action boundary or authoritative basis is unvalidated.

gate_definitions.name: procurement
gate_definitions.pass: A named payer has authority and a documented direct/private route below formal procurement thresholds.
gate_definitions.fail: The first pilot necessarily uses public or enterprise procurement.
gate_definitions.unknown: Payer authority or payment route remains unknown.

gate_definitions.name: manual-mvp
gate_definitions.pass: A bounded SOP, representative authorized or synthetic timed packet, error criteria, founder hours, and repeatability establish one-founder delivery.
gate_definitions.fail: The representative packet exceeds the cap, is unreliable, or requires unavailable expertise.

gate_definitions.name: channel
gate_definitions.pass: A named role, channel, permission rule, and repeatable identification/reach route are documented.
gate_definitions.fail: Channel rules bar access or the named buyer is unreachable there.
gate_definitions.unknown: A directory or community exists but authority, permission, or conversion route is unknown.

gate_definitions.name: recurrence
gate_definitions.pass: Segment-specific pain occurs at least monthly with an observable metric and baseline.
gate_definitions.fail: Credible evidence shows cadence below monthly or pain is not measurable.
gate_definitions.unknown: Only category/report cadence or aggregate harm is known.

gate_definitions.name: paid-pilot
gate_definitions.pass: A fixed buyer, scope, duration, price, metric, and payment or credible documented commitment exist.
gate_definitions.fail: Qualified buyers reject the bounded offer/price or substitutes remove the paid job.
gate_definitions.unknown: A wedge or competitor price exists without WTP or commitment.

permitted_evidence: accepted raw public/offline sources, owner-authorized inputs, and bounded cited inference
nonpublic_evidence_policy: record C and stop when outreach, payment, private data, or counsel is unauthorized
